title: RIP Robert Murray-Smith (1963 - 2025)
description:
To memorialise Robert, we are asking those wishing to offer support to make donations in his name to men's mental health and suicide prevention charity CALM (Campaign Against Living Miserably) using the following link:

https://www.thecalmzone.net/donate

All donations are greatly appreciated and we thank you once again for all your support to Robert throughout his time running this channel.
